id.description: Lowercase kebab-case. Must equal the template's folder name.

title.description: Display name. Lead with the use case ("Plan and ship a project"), not the feature.

description.description: One or two sentences shown in the gallery.

version.description: Semver. Bump on every content change.

license.description: Must be permissive — users own the files they instantiate.

icon.description: Square (1:1) icon image filename directly inside the template folder, VS Code-extension style. Max 512 KB. Shown only in the gallery — never copied into a user's workspace.
